zone.description: Scaleway zone for all machines (e.g. fr-par-1). Use zones for multi-zone distribution.

zones.description: List of enabled zones. The provider distributes machines across them using a hash of the request ID. Takes precedence over zone.

commercial_type.description: Scaleway instance type, e.g. DEV1-S, GP1-XS, PRO2-S

image_id.description: UUID of a Talos OS image pre-uploaded to Scaleway (zone-specific). Use image_name for multi-zone setups.

image_name.description: Base name of a Talos OS image. The arch suffix is appended automatically (e.g. "talos-v1.12.6" → "talos-v1.12.6-amd64"). Allows using the same machine class across zones.

arch.description: CPU architecture: amd64 (default) or arm64. Used to select the correct image when image_name is set.

tags.description: Optional tags to apply to the Scaleway instance

private_network_ids.description: Map of Scaleway region to Private Network UUID. Each instance is attached to the private network matching its region. Example: {"fr-par": "pn-...", "nl-ams": "pn-..."}. Scaleway Private Networks are regional and span all zones in a region.
